schema_id.description: Unique identifier for this schema document

suite_id.description: The suite this budget applies to

max_case_count.description: Maximum number of test cases allowed in a single run

max_execution_seconds.description: Maximum wall-clock time in seconds for the evaluation run

max_tool_calls.description: Maximum number of tool invocations allowed

max_network_requests.description: Maximum number of outbound network requests permitted

max_disk_bytes.description: Maximum disk space in bytes the evaluation may consume

allow_network.description: Whether network access is permitted during evaluation

allow_subprocess.description: Whether subprocess spawning is permitted during evaluation

allowed_tools.description: Explicitly allowed tool identifiers; empty means all tools are disallowed

warnings.description: Non-fatal issues detected during budget definition

errors.description: Fatal issues detected during budget definition
